Player.bio:
• Olympic Participation: 2 (2018, 2022) 

  • Olympic Medals (G/S/B): 1 G, 1 S 

  • World Championship Participation: 6 (2017, 2019, 2021, 2022, 2023, 2024) 

  • World Championship Medals (G/S/B): 3 G, 2 S, 1 B 

  • Scored her first IIHF World Championship goal in 2019 during Canada’s quarterfinal victory over Germany, contributing to the team’s bronze medal finish. 

  • Played in the PWHPA from 2019-2023, winning the Secret Cup® with Team Bauer in 2021 

  • Finished fourth in PWHPA in 2022-23 with 21 points (9G, 12A) in 20 GP with Team adidas 

  • Played for the Dartmouth College Big Green in the NCAA, earning Rookie of the Year honors in 2012-2013. 

  • In her third season, tied for the team lead in points and was named an Ivy League Honorable Mention 

  • Served as the Big Green’s captain in her final college season, leading the team in points, earning Team MVP honors, and being selected to the Ivy League First All-Star Team. 

  • Won gold at the Nations Cup in 2015 and 2016 with Canada’s National Development Team.
Player.name: Laura Stacey
